_comment: Portable social-pipeline defaults so a FRESH git clone runs the SAME setup as the owner — tokens excluded (those live in Settings → API Keys / flowork.db, never pushed). Loaded on boot by seedSocialDefaults(): the schedule is installed ONLY when trigger_rules is empty (never clobbers an existing schedule); flowork_tele_link is set per group only when absent. [2026-06-20: social-promo/trend crews (repo-reviewer/promo-x/promo-devto) DIHAPUS owner — entry mati dibuang biar fresh-clone & boot ga materialize group hantu. Rebuild via AI Studio kelak.]
_kv_comment: Setting global (flowork.db kv) supaya fresh clone = pengalaman owner. Di-set HANYA kalau kosong (tak menimpa nilai user / nilai owner yang sudah ada). Nilai PERSONAL diganti 'change me' → GUI Settings nampilin 'change me' sampai user isi. Yang generik di-ship apa adanya.
